name: HEALTHY EXTRACTS INC.
business: We are a platform for acquiring, developing, patenting, marketing, and distributing plant-based nutraceuticals. Our proprietary and patented products target select high-growth categories within the multibillion-dollar nutraceuticals market, such as heart, brain and immune health. Gummy USA added contract manufacturing and formulation services to our offering.

exposures.sentence: We are a platform for acquiring, developing, patenting, marketing, and distributing plant-based nutraceuticals.

Our approach to the market has been to implement a multi-channel marketing strategy that includes major eCommerce websites, distributors, white and private label, direct-to-consumer, influencer and affiliate programs, and traditional retail marketplaces.
Gummy USA added contract manufacturing and formulation services to our offering.
Our future growth is partially tied to our ability to improve our knowledge and implementation of mobile, AI, machine learning, and other advanced technologies in a retail environment.

catalysts.event: Launch of supplements supporting CoQ10, weight management, hydration, and gut health
catalysts.sentence: These health products are ready to be manufactured and made available in early 2025.

catalysts.event: Launch of hydration and weight management gel
catalysts.sentence: We plan to introduce a hydration and weight management gel in early 2025.
In October 2025, we acquired Gummy USA, which accelerated our revenue growth and increased our gross profit.

tamClaims.claim: The overall nutraceutical market is expected to grow at a 7.7% CAGR and reach $1.1 trillion by 2033.
tamClaims.sentence: The overall nutraceutical market is expected to grow at a 7.7% compounded annual growth rate ( CAGR ) and is expected to reach $1.1 trillion by 2033, according to Grand View Research.

tamClaims.claim: The global heart-health ingredients market is projected to grow at a 4.6% CAGR to reach $55.3 billion by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: Our BergaMet all-natural Citrus Bergamot SuperFruit formulations address an expanding global heart-health ingredients market that is projected to grow at a 4.6% CAGR to reach $55.3 billion by 2027, according to ResearchAndMarkets.

tamClaims.claim: The brain health market is growing at a 9.4% CAGR and is expected to reach $15.7 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Our UBN products tap the fast-growing market for brain health, which is growing at a 9.4% CAGR and is expected to reach $15.7 billion by 2030, according to Grandview Research.

tamClaims.claim: Gummy delivery for nutraceuticals is experiencing a 10-15% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: Gummy delivery is experiencing a 10-15% CAGR for nutraceuticals, again according to Grand View Research.

tamClaims.claim: The global gut health market is growing at a 7.9% CAGR to reach nearly $72 billion by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: The new gut health product will allow us to address a large and expanding global gut health market that is growing at a 7.9% CAGR to reach nearly $72 billion by 2027, according to Fortune Business Insights.

tamClaims.claim: Americans consume over $12.5 billion per year in energy shots and drinks.
tamClaims.sentence: Americans consume unhealthy energy shots and drinks every day, with this alone generating over $12.5 billion per year in industry sales.
